MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Oct-17-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
